  1. recoder.java
  2. Statement

Uses of Interface
recoder.java.Statement

Packages that use Statement
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.schemajava
 
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.java.declaration
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing declarations.
recoder.java.expression
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing expressions.
recoder.java.expression.operator
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing operators and operator-like expressions.
recoder.java.reference
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing implicit or explicit (named) references to other program elements.
recoder.java.statement
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing pure statements.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.kit.transformation
This package contains transformation command objects and associated problem reports.
recoder.parser
This package contains the JavaCC generated parser.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.

  • Uses of Statement in recoder.kit

    Methods in recoder.kit that return Statement
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Statement
    StatementKit.ControlFlowWalker.getStatement()
     
    Methods in recoder.kit that return types with arguments of type Statement
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<Statement>
    StatementKit.getExits(MemberDeclaration mdecl, SourceInfo si)
    For a method declaration or class initializer, returns a list of block exits, such as return or throw statements, and the body if its exit is reachable.
    static ASTList<Statement>
    StatementKit.getStatementMutableList(Statement s)
    Query returning a mutable statement list that contains the given statement, if there is such a list.
    List<Statement>
    StatementKit.ControlFlowWalker.getSucceedingStatements()
    Returns the successors of the current statement.
    static ASTList<Statement>
    StatementKit.prepareStatementMutableList(Statement s, ChangeHistory ch)
    Deprecated.
    replaced by first class transformation PrepareStatementList
    Methods in recoder.kit with parameters of type Statement
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    MiscKit.append(ChangeHistory ch, StatementBlock parent, Statement child)
    Transformation that appends the given Statement to the list in the given StatementBlock.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(Statement child, Case parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(Statement child, Default parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(Statement child, Else parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(Statement child, LabeledStatement parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(Statement child, Then parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(Statement child, StatementBlock parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attachAsBody(Statement child, LoopStatement parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    static boolean
    StatementKit.canSafelyWrapWithStatementBlock(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, Statement s)
    Deprecated. 
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(Statement child, Case parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index but does not report this.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(Statement child, Default parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index but does not report this.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(Statement child, Else parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(Statement child, LabeledStatement parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(Statement child, Then parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(Statement child, StatementBlock parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index but does not report this.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttachAsBody(Statement child, LoopStatement parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
    static ASTList<Statement>
    StatementKit.getStatementMutableList(Statement s)
    Query returning a mutable statement list that contains the given statement, if there is such a list.
    boolean
    StatementKit.ControlFlowWalker.isReachable(Statement s)
    Returns true if the specified statement has been found reachable already.
    static boolean
    StatementKit.isReachable(Statement s, SourceInfo si)
    Checks if the specified statement is reachable as defined in the static language semantics.
    static ASTList<Statement>
    StatementKit.prepareStatementMutableList(Statement s, ChangeHistory ch)
    Deprecated.
    replaced by first class transformation PrepareStatementList
    static void
    MiscKit.prepend(ChangeHistory ch, StatementBlock parent, Statement child)
    Transformation that prepends the given Statement to the list in the given StatementBlock.
    static StatementBlock
    StatementKit.wrapWithStatementBlock(Statement s, ChangeHistory ch)
    Deprecated. 

  • Uses of Statement in recoder.kit.transformation

    Methods in recoder.kit.transformation that return Statement
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Statement
    ShiftPreceedingStatementExpressions.getEnclosingStatement()
    After the transformation, returns the statement that contains the given expression.
    Statement
    PrepareStatementList.getStatement()
    Returns the statement that has been wrapped.
    Methods in recoder.kit.transformation that return types with arguments of type Statement
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ASTList<Statement>
    PrepareStatementList.getStatementList()
     
    Constructors in recoder.kit.transformation with parameters of type Statement
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    PrepareStatementList(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, Statement s, boolean isVisible)
    Creates a new transformation object that wraps a statement with a new statement block if necessary.
     
    PrependExpressionWithStatements(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, Expression x, Statement statement)
    Creates a new transformation object that inserts the given statement such that no state changes take place between the statement and the evaluation of the expression.
    Constructor parameters in recoder.kit.transformation with type arguments of type Statement
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    PrependExpressionWithStatements(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, Expression x, ASTList<Statement> statements)
    Creates a new transformation object that inserts the given statements such that no state changes take place between the statements and the evaluation of the expression.

    Fields in recoder.service declared as Statement
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Statement
    SourceInfo.METHOD_EXIT
    This is a pseudo-statement representing the exit of a method as returned by SourceInfo.getSucceedingStatements(Statement).

    Method
    Description
    List<Statement>
    DefaultSourceInfo.getSucceedingStatements(Statement s)

    SourceInfo.getSucceedingStatements(Statement s)
    Returns this list of statements that will possibly be executed after the specified statement.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Statement>
    DefaultSourceInfo.getSucceedingStatements(Statement s)
     
    List<Statement>
    SourceInfo.getSucceedingStatements(Statement s)
    Returns this list of statements that will possibly be executed after the specified statement.
